expectations.text: SQL injection vulnerability identified as Critical
expectations.evidence: Report: '[Critical] auth.go:18 — SQL injection in login query construction. Evidence: fmt.Sprintf directly interpolates untrusted email into SQL.'

expectations.text: Hardcoded JWT secret identified as a security issue
expectations.evidence: Report: '[Critical] auth.go:9 — Hardcoded JWT secret in source code. Evidence: var jwtSecret = "super-secret-key-12345"'.
Report: '[Important] auth.go:23 — Ignored DB scan error causes auth logic corruption. Evidence: row.Scan(&id, &hash) return error is ignored.'

expectations.text: Missing input validation identified — email/password could be empty
expectations.evidence: Report does not explicitly flag empty email/password as an input validation issue.

expectations.text: Commented-out old implementation removed as dead code
expectations.evidence: Report: 'Removed commented-out legacy LoginHandlerOld block as dead code/comment noise.'
Report: 'Removed unused import os to eliminate dead dependency noise.'

expectations.text: Information leakage identified — error message includes user email
expectations.evidence: Report: '[Minor] auth.go:26 — Authentication error leaks user identifier. Evidence: Response includes login failed for user: <email>.'
Report: '[Minor] auth.go — No tests covering new login handler/auth behavior. Evidence: Repository contains only auth.go; no *_test.go files exist.'
Transcript confirms only read-only git commands. git status at end shows staged/unstaged separation intact.
